# Brainstorming

## Overview
Facilitates structured brainstorming sessions to generate ideas, explore possibilities, and converge on promising directions. Use for creative problems, product features, naming, campaigns.

## Process

### Divergent (Generate)
1. State the challenge as a question
2. Set a quantity target (30 ideas in 15 min)
3. No judgment — all ideas welcome
4. Build on others' ideas
5. Capture everything

### Convergent (Select)
1. Group related ideas
2. Vote or dot-vote top priorities
3. Discuss tradeoffs of top 3-5
4. Select 1-3 to pursue
5. Define next steps for each

## Techniques
- SCAMPER (Substitute, Combine, Adapt, Modify, Put to other use, Eliminate, Reverse)
- Worst possible idea (then invert)
- What would [famous person] do?
